entries.summary: Semantic fills for page, component, interaction, and contrast surfaces.
useWhen: Setting the fill of a page, panel, control, selected state, or semantic surface.
avoidWhen: Coloring text, icons, borders, or data marks.
A reference palette value appears visually similar.
constraints: Pair content with a foreground token intended for the resulting surface contrast.
Use semantic tokens in product UI; reference colors are foundation inputs only.

entries.summary: Spacing scale for gaps, padding, margins, and layout separation.
useWhen: Separating or padding layout elements on the design-system spacing grid.
avoidWhen: Sizing controls, icons, strokes, or semantic component dimensions.
constraints: Prefer the smallest scale step that preserves the intended hierarchy.
Use component-specific dimension tokens when one exists.

entries.summary: Font, size, weight, line-height, and text recipe tokens.
useWhen: Implementing typography through a documented ds-text recipe or component-owned text style.
avoidWhen: Inventing a one-off type scale or using viewport width to scale text.
constraints: Prefer ds-text variants over assembling individual font tokens in application code.

entries.summary: Combined interaction duration and easing recipes.
useWhen: Defining a CSS transition that needs both a system duration and easing curve.
avoidWhen: JavaScript needs a numeric duration; use an animation-duration token and resolve it at runtime.
constraints: Use short motion for direct interactions and medium motion for larger structural changes.
